fact: For Kharif crops, land preparation should start after the first monsoon showers. Deep plowing every three years helps in soil aeration and pest control.
Jeevamrut is a powerful organic fertilizer made from cow dung, urine, jaggery, and pulse flour. It enhances microbial activity in the soil.
Neem oil spray (5ml per liter of water) is effective against sucking pests like aphids and jassids in most vegetable crops.
Drip irrigation can save up to 40-70% water compared to flood irrigation and reduces the incidence of weeds and diseases.
